propositions: An ADR under docs/adr/ must record the signing substrate design including DSSE envelope, PAE, pluggable scheme registry, per-kind policy table, domain separation, and HMAC-as-legacy.
A developer reference under docs/ must document the sign(kind,body) and verify(kind,envelope,trust_root) APIs.
The reference must explain how a new kind registers a {scheme,namespace,trust_root}.
The documented substrate serves as a contract for two consumer epics to build on.
